abilities.description: Each opponent loses 2 life unless they discard a card. If you control a Demon or Devil, you gain 2 life.

abilities.description: Create a 1/1 red Devil creature token with "When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target."
Target player draws seven cards and loses 7 life.
